title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 08 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 08 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 08 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/08/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures continued to be in the doldrums, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 790, down 0.19% for the day.Traders sold goods according to market conditions. As the weekend approached, purchase willingness of steel mills declined somewhat. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
